strategy: Balance boss (13135). Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+5%); it resists 45% across most schools, so over-stack blades and traps.

The core rule: land a real hit on him EVERY round. Any round he is not hit, he Mass Feints your whole team (+70%/+30% traps on you) and then Mockenspiels all wizards the next round, turning his own attack into big damage through those traps.
DoT ticks do not count as a hit; you need a fresh damaging spell each round. Keep a cheap attack ready every turn to reset his clock while you build.
Stack blades and traps between forced hits, then land your big Myth, Life, or Death finisher.
cheatNotes: Hitting him resets his cheat cycle. Land a real damaging spell every round to keep it reset.
Any round you do not hit him, he Mass Feints your whole team (+70%/+30%), turning his next attack into a heavy hit on you. Never skip a hitting turn, and DoT ticks do not count.
The round after that Mass Feint, he Mockenspiels all wizards through those traps for big damage. Keep the clock reset with a hit every round.
